title: Define pilot acceptance contract
description: Acceptance: docs define ICP, offer, outreach volume, success thresholds, non-goals, compliance constraints, renewal criteria, and pilot proof pack. Validation: docs/BOUNTY_REQUIREMENTS.md and docs/VISION.md include the contract.
close_reason: Completed in first scaffold: campaign API/domain tests pass; README/VISION/bounty/domain/pilot docs are present; status MMDX preflight passed.

title: Implement signed outgoing webhooks with retries
description: Acceptance: campaign and target events deliver to webhookUrl with HMAC signatures, retry/backoff, dead-letter state, and replay. Validation: tests cover signing, retry, failure, and replay.
close_reason: Implemented outgoing signed webhook payload builders, injected dispatcher retries/backoff, dead-letter state, and replay with focused Vitest coverage.

title: Ship campaign API control-plane MVP
description: Acceptance: POST /campaigns accepts bounty-shaped payload; targets normalize; duplicates skip; safe per-sender schedule is returned; provider events update delivery/reply summary; npm test/typecheck/build pass.
close_reason: Completed in first scaffold: campaign API/domain tests pass; README/VISION/bounty/domain/pilot docs are present; status MMDX preflight passed.

title: Add approval and operator workbench flow
description: Acceptance: creators and copy can be approved/rejected before send; operator can claim work, mark sent/skipped/blocked, attach evidence, and log incidents. Validation: API or CLI tests cover approvals and audit trail.
close_reason: Implemented approval/workbench domain module with focused Vitest coverage

title: Generate pilot proof dashboard and report
description: Acceptance: report shows sourced, approved, contacted, delivered, replied, interested, opt-outs, complaints, duplicate skips, sender health, incidents, and renewal recommendation. Validation: sample pilot fixture generates the proof pack.
close_reason: Implemented proof-pack generator with sample pilot fixture covering sourced, approved, contacted, sent, delivered, replied, interested, opt-outs, complaints, duplicate skips, sender health, incidents, webhook outcomes, and renewal recommendation.

title: Model sender account operations and health
description: Acceptance: sender inventory tracks limits, cooldowns, lockouts, reconnect-required state, warm-up notes, and risk events. Validation: scheduler refuses unhealthy senders and reports sender health in campaign status.
close_reason: Implemented sender account health model with limits, cooldowns, lockouts, reconnect-required state, warm-up notes, risk events, scheduler refusal, and API senderHealth reporting; tests cover domain and API behavior.

title: Win Graphed Instagram creator outreach bounty
description: Outcome: build a managed, API-first Instagram creator outreach product that can run a real Graphed pilot and produce delivery/reply proof. Evidence: public repo, tests, campaign API, managed delivery adapter, sender ops, pilot runbook, and proof report. Failure avoided: shipping only a fragile script or pitch deck.

title: Select managed delivery path and sender accounts
description: Acceptance: choose the real pilot delivery path (managed provider or operator-run account pool), document account risk owner, sender limits, warm-up state, credential/reconnect process, and prove one low-risk test handoff without claiming official cold-DM compliance. Validation: pilot runbook records provider/account decision and a dry-run or test-send evidence artifact.
close_reason: Selected operator-run managed manual delivery for first pilot, documented private sender-account requirements and risk posture in docs/PILOT_RUNBOOK.md, and added dry-run evidence artifact without claiming live Instagram delivery.

title: Wire campaign execution runner
description: Acceptance: campaign execution creates approved send intents from the approval workbench, routes them through the selected managed delivery adapter, records delivery/reply/restricted/failed events, dispatches outgoing webhooks, and feeds the proof-pack generator. Validation: integration test covers approval-to-delivery-to-webhook-to-proof flow using an injected provider adapter.

title: Run live Graphed pilot and publish proof
description: Acceptance: run a controlled Graphed pilot with a vetted creator list and selected managed delivery path, then publish a proof pack showing sourced, approved, contacted, delivered, replied, interested, opt-outs, complaints, duplicate skips, sender health, incidents, and renewal recommendation. Validation: final proof report is generated from real pilot records, not only sample fixtures.

title: Implement managed delivery adapter interface
description: Acceptance: outbox send intents can be claimed by mock, manual, or provider adapters; adapter reports sent/failed/restricted/replied events; no code claims official cold-DM compliance. Validation: adapter contract tests and a manual-provider pilot dry run.
close_reason: Implemented managed delivery adapter contract for mock, manual, and provider-backed paths with risk posture fixed to officialColdDmCompliance=not_claimed; tests cover sent, failed, restricted, replied, and manual evidence flows.

title: Add persistent campaign store and idempotency
description: Acceptance: campaigns, targets, provider events, idempotency keys, and suppression records persist across process restarts. Validation: storage tests prove create/get/update/replay behavior and migration command is documented.
close_reason: Implemented JSON-backed campaign persistence with idempotency keys and durable suppression records; tests cover create/get/update/replay, cross-campaign suppression, and API idempotency.
